title: Business Registration
description: Business entity registration record from a state secretary of state or equivalent authority.

entity_name.description: Legal registered name of the entity. Commonly found in: secretary of state website, business registry.

entity_name_aliases.description: DBA or trade names. Commonly found in: secretary of state website, DBA filings.

entity_type.description: Legal entity type. Commonly found in: secretary of state website, formation documents.

state_of_formation.description: US state where the entity was formed. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

foreign_qualification_states.description: States where the entity is registered as a foreign entity. Commonly found in: state business registries.

status.description: Current status of the entity. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

formation_date.description: Date the entity was formed. Commonly found in: secretary of state website, articles of incorporation.

dissolution_date.description: Date of dissolution if applicable. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

registered_agent_name.description: Name of the registered agent. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

registered_agent_address.description: Address of the registered agent. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

principal_office_address.description: Principal office street address. Commonly found in: secretary of state website, annual report.

city.description: City of the principal office. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

state.description: State of the principal office. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

zip_code.description: ZIP code of the principal office. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

officers_and_directors.description: Officers, directors, and managers. Commonly found in: secretary of state website, annual report.

annual_report_due_date.description: Due date for next annual report. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

entity_number.description: State-assigned entity or file number. Commonly found in: secretary of state website.

irs_ein.description: IRS Employer Identification Number (EIN). Commonly found in: IRS records, business filings.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

OfficerDirector.description: An officer, director, or manager of the entity.

name.description: Full name of the officer or director.

title.description: Title or role (e.g., CEO, Director, Manager).

address.description: Address of the officer or director.
